emails.subject: New Pulp Product - BKP PIX
emails.body: New Pulp Product BKP PIX Mark Please review and offer you approval/comments. This Index is exactly the same as the NBSK PIX Index that we just worked on with the exception that its price is quoted in EURO's. Dale 3-9746
